creator: radiomlodychbandytow@o2.pl
text:
Oh my... a search engine made me do it.

Thanks for the correction, but my comment is relevant to the current 
guide too.

On 2011-09-04 20:08, Benedict Reuschling wrote:
> ^^^^^
> You are looking at an older version of the handbook which has the
> copyright year 2004 and covers FreeBSD 4.10-RELEASE and FreeBSD
> 5.2.1-RELEASE which is hosted on one of our project developer's
> homepage. You might want to compare it with the current version of the
> handbook which can be found here (just use the direct link on
> FreeBSD.org on the documentation link):
>
> http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/
>
> Regards
>
> Benedict Reuschling
> FreeBSD Doc Committer


-- 
Twoje radio
